rejected_candidates.sql:
WITH overall_avg AS (
  SELECT AVG(age_at_diagnosis) AS avg_age
  FROM clinical_v1_1
),
group_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    c1.case_gdc_id,
    COUNT(*) AS row_count,
    AVG(c1.age_at_diagnosis) AS avg_age
  FROM clinical_v1_1 c1
  JOIN clinical_v1 c2 ON c1.case_gdc_id = c2.case_gdc_id
  JOIN clinical c3 ON c1.case_gdc_id = c3.case_gdc_id
  GROUP BY c1.case_gdc_id
)
SELECT 
  gs.case_gdc_id,
  gs.row_count,
  gs.avg_age,
  gs.avg_age - oa.avg_age AS difference
FROM group_stats gs
CROSS JOIN overall_avg oa
WHERE gs.avg_age > oa.avg_age
